## Safety and release impact

- [ ] No credentials, cookies, storage state, customer data, private source, or
      unredacted sensitive paths are included
- [ ] Browser and agent actions preserve approval and forbidden-action boundaries
- [ ] Public API, artifact, dependency, or license changes are documented
- [ ] A changelog entry is included, or this change does not need one

External contributions require the separately signed agreement described in
`CONTRIBUTING.md`. A pull-request statement or checkbox does not replace it.
